steps.title: Set up total distance
steps.content:
Distance equals rate times time. The first part of the trip covers $70x$ miles, and the second part covers $40y$ miles, for a total of $230$ miles:
$$70x+40y=230$$

steps.title: Substitute the first time
steps.content:
Use $x=1$ and solve for $y$:
$$70(1)+40y=230$$
$$40y=160$$
$$y=4$$
The answer is 4.
